title: Test-Suite Findings
description: Stable JSON contract emitted by every test (lint, axe, alfa, pa11y, etc.) so the unified report shell and downstream agents can consume a single shape regardless of which tool produced the data.

schema_version.description: Increment major when the shape changes incompatibly. Consumers should refuse to render unknown major versions.

test.description: Which test produced this findings file.

tool.description: Specific underlying tool (e.g. 'siteimprove-alfa', 'axe-core', 'pa11y-ci', 'phpcs', 'phpstan', 'eslint', 'stylelint'). Optional when the test name is sufficient.

surface.description: Where this run executed. Lets the report banner show '[Local / upstream]' vs '[CI / multidev pr-123]' vs '[Local / site: my-site.test]'.

context.description: Where the run executed. 'local' = developer machine (any base_url); 'ci' = repo-wide CI run with no deployed site (e.g. the lint job; base_url is the Actions run); 'ci-multidev' = CI on a preview/multidev environment.

base_url.description: BASE_URL the test ran against (a11y tests only).

profile.description: Which accessibility profile was applied. Optional; lint tests omit this.

key.description: Profile preset key (strict / standard / comprehensive / custom).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this findings file was emitted.

duration_ms.description: Wall time the test took, in milliseconds.

gate.description: What fails the build. Report-only lanes set fails_build:false.

fails_build.description: Whether findings from this lane fail the build.

severities.description: Severities that fail the build when fails_build is true.

summary.description: Pre-computed rollups so consumers don't have to re-aggregate the findings array.

totals_by_severity.description: Count of findings per severity tier.

totals_by_impact.description: Count of findings per user-impact category. Lint findings default to 'code-quality'; composer audit findings (CVE advisories, abandoned packages) land under 'security'.

pages_tested.description: How many pages this test evaluated (a11y tests only).

pages_errored.description: How many pages could not be audited (navigation error or timeout). Present only when nonzero; forces status to 'incomplete'.

files_scanned.description: How many source files this test evaluated (lint tests only).

status.description: Overall test outcome. 'fail' = blocking failures; 'findings-found' = non-blocking findings exist; 'pass' = clean; 'skipped' = test not run; 'incomplete' = did not verify everything it targeted (0 pages crawled, or some pages errored); 'error' = tool itself crashed.

findings.description: Individual issues. May be empty if the test ran clean.

id.description: Stable per-finding identifier, e.g. 'alfa:SIA-R111' or 'lint:phpcs:Drupal.Commenting.FunctionComment.MissingShort'. Used as a dedup key across runs.

rule_id.description: Tool-native rule ID without the test prefix (e.g. 'SIA-R111', 'image-alt', 'WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_1.1_1_1.H37').

rule_url.description: Link to upstream documentation for this rule.

severity.description: Normalized severity tier across tools. Mapping is tool-specific and curated in rule-headlines.json when raw severities differ.

impact_category.description: User-facing axis used for grouping in the unified shell's Issues section. 'security' covers CVE advisories and abandoned-package replacements surfaced by composer audit (and similar future scanners).

headline.description: Plain-language one-liner the site builder sees (e.g. 'Image without alt text — 4 instances'). Curated in rule-headlines.json when the tool's native message is too jargony.

description.description: Tool-native description / message. Shown alongside rule ID in the technical detail block.

fix_hint.description: Plain-language remediation hint. From rule-headlines.json when curated, else from the tool's native fix recommendation.

wcag_criteria.description: WCAG success criteria this finding violates (e.g. ['1.1.1', '4.1.2']). a11y tests only.

occurrences.description: How many times this finding appears in the data (across pages or files).

locations.description: Where the finding manifested. Each entry covers one page or one file.

kind.description: Whether this location is a rendered URL or a source file.

path.description: URL path (for 'page') or file path (for 'file'). File paths are always repo-relative and normalized to a consistent form across every lane (e.g. web/modules/custom/<m>/..., web/themes/custom/<t>/...), so id-based dedup and downstream file resolution are reliable.

selector.description: CSS selector for the offending DOM element (a11y tests only).

snippet.description: HTML or source snippet showing the offending content.

occurrences.description: Times this finding occurs at this specific location.
